tool.name: Gemini Enterprise
tool.description: Enterprise agentic AI platform and successor packaging for the former Agentspace product line.
tool.statusNote: Agentspace has been absorbed into Gemini Enterprise.
tool.logoNotes: Official Gemini product logo asset from the owner-controlled Google Workspace Gemini page (`logo_gemini_2025_color_2x_web_96dp.png`), verified byte-for-byte against the live source on 2026-05-14; Gemini Enterprise currently uses the same shared Gemini visual identity.
tool.practitionerNote: Worth evaluating for Google-first organizations that want assistant and agent capabilities under one commercial umbrella, but packaging maturity should still be checked closely.

dataResidency.detail: US/EU multi-region; residency per Workspace settings; relaxed when Search grounding is enabled.

deployment.detail: SaaS via Google Workspace / GCP; CMEK/VPC-SC in US/EU; no self-hosted option.

auditLogging.detail: Access Transparency and Cloud Audit Logs cover Gemini Enterprise.

iso42001.detail: ISO 42001 not listed on the Gemini Enterprise compliance page (the Workspace app SKU holds it).

euAiAct.detail: Assessed limited-risk by product category; no published vendor EU AI Act conformity assessment.
